subcodes.first_line: O Lord! I have submitted my cause to Thee, abstaining from all that is contrary to Thy good pleasure, and have withdrawn from the affairs of this world, hoping for Thy protection, Thy succor, and Thy grace [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب احتکم فی من احتشم و اعتذل و اعتزل من غیر رضائک راجیا صونک و عونک و حسن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for protection
